description_long: This is a light-colored wooden chest of drawers with a simple, modern design. It features three drawers, each with a small, round knob handle centered on the drawer front. The top drawer is shown partially open, revealing a spacious interior suitable for storing clothing or other items. The sides and back are plain, with no visible decorative elements or hardware. The chest stands on short, integrated legs that slightly elevate it from the ground. The overall finish is smooth and matte, giving it a clean and understated appearance suitable for urban interiors or utility spaces.
description: A light wood chest of drawers with three drawers and round knob handles, featuring a smooth, matte finish and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three drawers, with the top drawer open and round knob handles visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth and plain side panel, with the top drawer partially open.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless, flat back panel with no visible hardware or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the top drawer partially open and the plain side panel.
